sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sign (value double, sign_value tinyint);
INSERT INTO test_sign (value, sign_value) VALUES (10.5, sign(10.5));
INSERT INTO test_sign (value, sign_value) VALUES (-3.2, sign(-3.2));
UPDATE test_sign SET sign_value = sign(value) WHERE value < 0;
SELECT value, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_sign WHERE sign(value) = 1;
